states.title: Thermal-Optical Feed
states.text: Thermal bands overlay the optical channel. Surface temperatures are legible. Stellar flux cross-references with tissue absorption data.

states.title: Radio Band Feed
states.text: Electromagnetic input at radio frequencies is now resolved. Structured signals are detectable within background noise.

states.title: Velocity Feed
states.text: Positional change across cycles is now tracked. Motion has a vector. Drift is measurable against fixed reference points.

states.title: Gamma Band Feed
states.text: High-energy photon events are registering. Radiation sources can be located and classified by emission profile.

states.title: Gravitational Feed
states.text: Local gravitational gradients are resolved. Orbital geometry has become navigable data rather than estimated constraint.

states.title: Inertial Feed
states.text: Inertial state is readable. Acceleration vectors are coarse - enough to distinguish thrust from drift.

states.title: Inertial Feed
states.text: Labyrinthine fluid arrays yield finer inertial resolution. Rotational components are separating from linear ones. Manoeuvre signatures are becoming classifiable.

states.title: Inertial Feed
states.text: Full inertial history is reconstructable. Acceleration, rotation, and micro-vibration are distinct data streams. Prior trajectories are partially recoverable from residual motion records.
